name: VIMY RESOURCES LIMITED
summary: Vimy Resources Limited, a resource development company, explores and evaluates uranium projects in Australia. The company's flagship property is the 100% owned Mulga Rock project located to the east-northeast of the Kalgoorlie in Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Energy and Minerals Australia Limited and changed its name to Vimy Resources Limited in December 2014. Vimy Resources Limited was founded in 2006 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
